title: cyanus orbelicus
intro: Cyanus orbelicus, also known as Cornflower, is a perennial plant native to the Balkan Peninsula in southeastern Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. The health benefits of Cyanus orbelicus include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the flowers of the plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and they can also be used topically to create creams and salves for skin conditions.
